targetLook: Pure Ultima VIII-first historical isometric gameplay art for 1580 Melaka

gameplay: File is in an approved gameplay directory.
File name matches the repo naming pattern.
Named character sheets are 64x192 with row-major walk/idle/talk layout.
Crowd silhouettes are 8x16 and reserved for background atmosphere only.
Frame size or footprint matches the spec.
The asset reads clearly on the 320x180 native canvas.
The asset only uses the approved indexed ramp palette.
A historical reference exists and was checked.
cinematic: Scene is 960x540 or portrait is square and large enough.
It does not contain gameplay UI or debug text.
It is tagged as cinematic, not gameplay.
promotion: Move exploratory work into concept/staging paths.
Gameplay promotion requires validator parity with the live TypeScript Phaser runtime.
Fix warnings before promoting player-facing assets.
Promote only after the audit is clean for that asset class.

named-character-sheet.silhouetteTest: must read role, culture, and status at 16x32 native and at 48x96 scaled
named-character-sheet.materialTreatment: cloth folds via 2-3 shade steps within a single ramp, metal via specular ramp highlight, skin via dedicated skin ramp
named-character-sheet.minimumContrast: at least 3 ramp steps between darkest shadow and brightest highlight on primary garment

crowd-silhouette.outlineWeight: 1px or none; shape must carry all information
crowd-silhouette.internalShading: flat fill with at most 2 shade steps

base-tile.outlineWeight: no outline; edges defined by color contrast with neighbors
base-tile.internalShading: ordered dithering between adjacent ramp entries
base-tile.materialTreatment: texture must imply physical material (stone grain, wood grain, water refraction, earth granularity)
base-tile.seamTreatment: seamless tileable; no visible repeat artifacts at 4x4 tile coverage

iso-tile.outlineWeight: no outline; 2:1 diamond footprint defined by color contrast
iso-tile.materialTreatment: same as base-tile, adapted to isometric perspective

static-object.outlineWeight: 1px hard outline, darkest ramp entry for the object's primary material
static-object.shadowDirection: south-east drop shadow or implied ground contact shadow
static-object.materialTreatment: wood shows grain, metal shows specular, fabric shows folds, stone shows weathering
static-object.physicalityTest: object must look like it has weight and could be picked up or bumped

animated-object.frameConsistency: outline and shadow must not shift between frames; only the animated element changes

scene-backdrop.note: cinematic class; Ultima VIII density and palette inform composition but strict pixel rules are relaxed
scene-backdrop.densityTarget: environment should feel crowded, layered, and physically plausible per Ultima VIII city/interior screenshots
scene-backdrop.paletteAffinity: should lean toward palette.cjs ramps even when higher fidelity is allowed

portrait.note: cinematic class; VGA-grade color clusters, strong silhouette, no soft airbrush
portrait.colorClusters: use 4-6 distinct value bands per material, analogous to VGA portrait palettes
portrait.silhouetteTest: face and headwear must read clearly at 64x64 minimum
portrait.antiAliasing: minimal; only where needed for face-scale readability
